project.description: Target Angular project name. Defaults to the workspace default project.

styles.description: How to wire ngwr styles. `all` appends `@use 'ngwr';` to the project's global stylesheet. `none` skips — opt in per-component later via `ng g ngwr:component-style <name>`.

x-prompt.message: How should ngwr styles be wired?

dateAdapter.description: Wire a date adapter for calendar / date-picker. `none` skips. `native` uses the built-in Date adapter (no extra deps). `date-fns` / `luxon` auto-install the corresponding peer.

x-prompt.message: Wire a date adapter? (Used by calendar / date-picker.)

items.label: Native — built-in Date, no extra deps

density.description: Default density wired via `provideWrDensity()`. `none` uses lib defaults (md).

theme.description: Theme starter for `data-wr-theme` on `<html>`. `system` auto-switches via `prefers-color-scheme`.

skipPeerInstall.description: Skip running the package manager install task — useful in monorepos where you manage installs yourself.
